sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: can replace much worse drinks because that substitution value matters more than raw micronutrients here. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: easy to overpay for the health halo because the benefits are usually less magical than the branding suggests. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Kombucha (Unsweetened) does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
